metaData.Key Information: You can now enjoy a timeless and tasty treat that’s made with real milk chocolate and surrounded by a colourful candy shell that melts in your mouth and not your hands. A fun and portable way to enjoy delicious milk chocolate M&M's candies. M&M's milk chocolate candy is the perfect snack and movie candy
metaData.Storage Information:
• Under cool, clean and dry conditions
• Avoid direct sunlight

metaData.Key Information: Kit Kat is a chocolate-coated wafer biscuit bar. Each bar consists of fingers composed of three layers of wafer, covered in an outer layer of chocolate. Each finger can be snapped from the bar separately.

offers.description: Buy 1 Nestle Kit Kat Milk Chocolate Pack @ $10.95

product.description: Toblerone is made from finest ingredients around the world. Reawaken your taste buds and immerse yourself in Toblerone's unique taste experience

metaData.Ingredients:
Milk Chocolate 71% [Sugar, Milk Solids (Cow'S Milk 15%), Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass 9%, Dried Glucose Syrup, Vegetable Fat and Oil (Palm, Illipe, Shea), Emulsifiers (Soya Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate), Natural Flavouring], Wafer 29% [Wheat Flour, Sugar Icing and Sugar, Palm Kernel Stearin, Cocoa Powder, Stabilizers (Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Carbonate), Iodized Salt, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin)].

Allergen Information: Contains Milk, Gluten (From Wheat), Soya. May Contain Peanuts and Tree Nuts.
metaData.Key Information: The perfect balance of rich & smooth milk chocolate coating freshly baked crispy wafer for that perfect break! Available in share pack format - perfect for sharing
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: Nestle Kit Kat 2 Finger Chocolate Bar - Milk

product.description: Nestle Kit Kat Chunky is the perfect snack for any break time. It can be enjoyed with family and friends at home, or with colleagues during the day. Have a break, have a Kit Kat.

metaData.Key Information:
• Delicious chocolate bar
• Made of 2 fingers of crispy wafer covered with smooth milk chocolate
• Made with sustainably sourced cocoa from the Nestle Cocoa Plan
• Suitable for vegetarians
metaData.Preparation:
1. Tear the Kit Kat wrapper along the tear strip
2. Eat and enjoy
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
